tagline: Defensive security engineering, detection content, and operational data systems.
mission: Build practical tools for authorized security review.
Turn evidence, logs, and telemetry into measurable defensive action.
Keep security work reproducible, auditable, and grounded in artifacts.

now_building.focus: Evidence-linked operational analytics, normalized records, dashboard search, and privacy-aware review flows.
now_building.next: Validate fresh records, searchable drilldowns, viewer gates, and source-linked summaries.

now_building.focus: Authorized public-surface review utilities and security audit workflows.
now_building.next: Expand tests, reporting, documentation, and safe input validation.

now_building.focus: Sigma, KQL, SPL, Elastic, structured indicators, and defensive validation scripts.
now_building.next: Convert repeatable incident patterns into tested detection content.

now_building.focus: Inventory, configuration review, service exposure checks, and rollback-safe automation.
now_building.next: Keep scripts small, auditable, reversible, and evidence-producing.

lithium_tracker.name: Lithium
current_focus: Readable relationship and operational signal dashboards
Evidence references attached to every claim
validation_targets: No raw file dependency in runtime dashboard views
